title: RoutingConfig
description: Route configuration shapes: RouteConfig, BridgePolicy, RouteRetryConfig, and RouteConfigSet. Derived from frozen dataclasses in config/routes.py.

route_id.description: Unique identifier for this route (alphanumeric, underscores, hyphens).

enabled.description: Whether this route is enabled at startup.

filter_hooks.description: Optional tuple of static filter hook names. Reserved — must be empty.

source_room.description: Optional source room ID (alias for source_channel).

dest_room.description: Optional destination room ID (alias for dest_channel).

policy.description: Optional static bridge policy. Null means no restrictions.

retry.description: Optional per-route retry policy. Null means no retry scheduling.

channel_room_map.description: Mapping of Meshtastic channel strings ('0'–'7') to Matrix room IDs. Each value is either a bare canonical room-ID string (carries no per-entry labels) or a structured table with 'room' plus optional 'source_origin_label' / 'dest_origin_label' that override the route-level labels for this entry's expanded legs only.

source_origin_label.description: Source-side human-readable label for the forward leg of this route (source→dest). When set, takes precedence over the source adapter's origin_label in relay-prefix attribution. Falls back to adapter config origin_label when null. This is source-context metadata, not a routing key or delivery evidence.

dest_origin_label.description: Source-side human-readable label for the reverse leg of this route (dest→source). Same precedence as source_origin_label but applied when direction is swapped during expansion. Falls back to adapter config origin_label when null.

oneOf.title: RouteConfigSet
oneOf.description: Ordered, validated collection of RouteConfig instances.

ChannelRoomMapEntry.title: ChannelRoomMapEntry
ChannelRoomMapEntry.description: A single channel_room_map entry mapping a Meshtastic channel index to a Matrix room ID, with optional per-entry origin labels that override the route-level labels for this entry's expanded legs only.

room.description: Canonical Matrix room ID starting with '!'. Required.

source_origin_label.description: Per-entry forward-leg source label. Null inherits the route-level source_origin_label. An explicit empty string suppresses the adapter-level fallback for this entry's forward leg.

dest_origin_label.description: Per-entry reverse-leg source label. Null inherits the route-level dest_origin_label. An explicit empty string suppresses the adapter-level fallback for this entry's reverse leg.

BridgePolicy.title: BridgePolicy
BridgePolicy.description: Static allowlist policy attached to a route. Empty tuples mean 'allow all'.

allowed_source_adapters.description: Source adapter IDs this policy permits.

allowed_dest_adapters.description: Destination adapter IDs this policy permits.

RouteRetryConfig.title: RouteRetryConfig
RouteRetryConfig.description: Per-route retry policy for transient delivery failures.

enabled.description: Whether retry scheduling is active for this route.

max_attempts.description: Maximum total delivery attempts (including the initial).

backoff_base.description: Base delay in seconds for exponential backoff.

max_delay_seconds.description: Upper bound for the computed backoff delay.

jitter.description: Whether to add jitter to the backoff delay.
